title: Employee Referral Program and Bonus Policy
text:
Q: How does the Employee Referral Program work and what is the bonus policy?
A: Our Employee Referral Program encourages employees to refer qualified candidates for open positions within the company. If your referral is hired and completes 90 days of employment, you will receive a bonus of $1,000, which will be paid in your next payroll cycle. To participate, submit your referral's resume along with a completed referral form to the HR department via email at hr@company.com. Ensure that your referral mentions your name during the application process to qualify for the bonus. The program is open to all full-time employees, but please note that referrals for positions at the executive level or for your direct reports are not eligible for bonuses. For any questions or further details, contact the HR team directly. Remember, the more quality candidates you refer, the more you can earn!
